items.name: Vegetable Biryani
items.description:
A fragrant masterpiece of aromatic basmati rice layered with fresh seasonal vegetables, saffron, and our signature blend of biryani spices. Each portion is dum-cooked to perfection, allowing the flavors to meld beautifully.
Served with raita and salan gravy, this royal dish offers a perfect balance of flavors and textures that vegetarian food lovers swear by.
items.simplified_description: A flavorful rice dish with vegetables and spices, served with yogurt and gravy.

items.name: Chicken Noodles
items.description:
Stir-fried egg noodles tossed with tender chicken pieces, crunchy vegetables, and our special Indo-Chinese sauce. This fusion dish combines the best of Chinese cooking techniques with Indian spices.
A popular street food favorite, garnished with spring onions and served with spicy schezwan sauce on the side.
items.simplified_description: Stir-fried noodles with chicken and vegetables in a spicy sauce.

items.name: Chicken Kheema Dosa
items.description:
A unique fusion of South and North Indian cuisines featuring our crispy dosa filled with spiced minced chicken, onions, and aromatic herbs. The kheema is slow-cooked to achieve perfect texture and flavor.
Served with our signature coconut chutney and sambar, this protein-rich dish offers a delightful twist on the traditional dosa.
items.simplified_description: A crispy crepe filled with spiced minced chicken and served with chutney.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Tender chicken pieces cooked in a rich, creamy tomato-based sauce with aromatic spices and butter. This beloved dish perfectly balances sweet, tangy, and mildly spiced flavors, served with naan bread or rice.
items.simplified_description: Chicken in a creamy tomato sauce, served with bread or rice.

items.name: Chicken 65
items.description: A spicy, deep-fried chicken dish from South India, marinated with red chilies, ginger, garlic, and unique spices. Garnished with curry leaves and served with a zesty sauce, it's perfect as an appetizer or side dish.
items.simplified_description: Spicy fried chicken, served with a tangy sauce.

items.name: Chicken Chettinad
items.description: A fiery curry from Tamil Nadu, featuring chicken cooked with freshly ground spices, black peppercorns, red chilies, and coconut. Known for its intense flavor profile and aromatic spice blend that creates a rich, complex taste.
items.simplified_description: Spicy chicken curry with a rich blend of spices.

items.name: Lamb Biryani
items.description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with tender, marinated goat meat, caramelized onions, and aromatic spices. Slow-cooked to perfection, this classic dish offers a harmonious blend of flavors in every bite.
items.simplified_description: A rice dish with marinated lamb and spices, slow-cooked for flavor.

items.name: Mysore Masala Dosa
items.description: A South Indian delicacy featuring a crispy rice and lentil crepe spread with spicy red chutney and filled with seasoned potato mixture. Served with coconut chutney and sambar, it offers a perfect blend of crispy texture and bold flavors.
items.simplified_description: Crispy crepe with spicy potato filling, served with chutney.

items.name: Pomfret Pollichathu
items.description: A Kerala specialty where pomfret fish is marinated in spices, wrapped in banana leaves, and slow-cooked to perfection. The banana leaves impart a unique flavor while keeping the fish moist and tender.
items.simplified_description: Fish marinated in spices and cooked in banana leaves for flavor.
